response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct vocal performances by Hoshimachi Suisei, separated by an instrumental transition. 2. Identified the first song as "天球、彗星は夜を跨いで" (Tenkyuu, Suisei wa Yoru wo Mataide) using on-screen context and lyrics. Searched for and retrieved the full lyrics in Japanese and English translation. 3. Identified the second song as "ソワレ" (Soirée) based on the visual cues in the video. 4. Due to the inability to retrieve the full, accurate text for "ソワレ" in the provided search results, the lyrics field for this song is null, but the metadata is accurately resolved.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live concert performance by the VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei, performing her songs "天球、彗星は夜を跨いで" and "ソワレ".

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei performs "天球、彗星は夜を跨いで" on stage.
scenes.song_title: 天球、彗星は夜を跨いで
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
明かりがひとつ灯った 灯った
天を彩った鋲が綺麗だ
僕の吐いた白い息のように、
消してしまえたらな

押し殺して深く沈んだ
泣き声さえ、聞こえているから
君を刺した不安も苦痛も、
僕の青色で塗り潰して

全部涙になって
星の海を流れていった
果てしない闇の中に
そっと青を添えたら
ほら

彗星が僕の頭上を飛んだ
誰もいない夜の空を染めた
深く寝静まった街の中へ
降り注ぐのは誰の悲しみだろう

星はまた弧を描いて飛んだ
もやのかかった思考を晴らして
「いつかまた会える」
なんて言えなかった
星が降ったあとの街、僕はまだ

黒くくすんだがらんどうの空を
箒星が彩るように
君を刺した不安も苦痛も
僕の青色で塗りつぶして

君の涙をそっと、星の海に流し込むんだ
尾を引いたその光が、誰かをまた救う
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A single light was lit, lit
The white thumbtacks coloring the sky are beautiful
If I could make them disappear
Like the white breath I exhaled

I swallowed my voice and sank deep
Because I can even hear the crying
The anxiety and pain that stabbed you
Paint it over with my blue

It all turned into tears
And flowed into the sea of stars
If I gently add blue
Into the endless darkness, look

A comet flew above my head
And dyed the empty night sky
Into the city that had fallen into a deep sleep
Whose sadness is pouring down?

The stars drew arcs and flew again
Clearing up my clouded thoughts
I couldn't say "we'll meet again someday"
In the city after the stars fell, I still

Like a shooting star coloring
The pitch-black, empty sky
The anxiety and pain that stabbed you
Paint it over with my blue

I'll gently pour your tears into the sea of stars
The light leaving a tail behind, will save someone again

scenes.description: Instrumental transition music while the performer prepares for the next song.
Hoshimachi Suisei performs "ソワレ" on stage.
